content.newText:
# Plan: Vault Process Flow Canvas

## Context

The vault has ~40+ puller scripts, an 8-agent MarketMind pipeline, 16 domain-level note agents, and 3,450+ data pull notes spread across 18 subfolders. There is no visual document showing how scripts feed outputs, how agents interconnect, or how data propagates from raw API calls through to signals and dashboards. This Canvas fills that gap — a single navigable map of the entire automated pull system.

---

## Approach

Create a Node.js generator script that programmatically builds the Canvas JSON, then write the output to `00_Dashboard/Vault Process Flow.canvas`. A generator script is preferable to hand-editing JSON because positions are computed, nodes are readable, and the layout can be re-run when the vault evolves.

---

## Canvas Architecture

**Layout:** Top-to-bottom, 6 horizontal layers. Each layer is a full-width label band (70px) followed by a row of 900×700 nodes. Layers separated by ~90px gap.

**Key differentiator from existing dashboards:** This Canvas **uses edges (arrows)** to show directed data flow — the existing dashboards have no edges. This makes the flow legible without reading node content.

**Total canvas dimensions:** ~5700px wide × ~5800px tall

---

## Layer Design

### Layer 1 — External Data Sources (y=150)
6 text nodes, color `3` (yellow):
| Node ID | Content |
|---------|---------|
| `src_market` | FMP: prices, fundamentals, news, float, short interest, insider trades |
| `src_macro` | FRED: Fed funds, yield curve, VIX, HY spreads · CBOE: put/call, skew |
| `src_sec` | SEC EDGAR: filings, company facts, 8-K, S-3 (no API key) |
| `src_bio` | FDA: approvals, recalls · ClinicalTrials.gov · PubMed/NIH |
| `src_news` | NewsAPI: headlines · arXiv: preprints · OpenAlex: research |
| `src_gov` | EIA: energy · BEA: GDP · SAM.gov · FPDS: contracts · OpenFEMA |

### Layer 2 — Lib Modules (y=1000)
6 text nodes, color `6` (purple):
| Node ID | Content |
|---------|---------|
| `lib_fmp` | `fmp-client.mjs` — FMP REST wrapper (prices, fundamentals, profile, float) |
| `lib_edgar` | `edgar.mjs` + `cik-map.mjs` — SEC EDGAR access + ticker↔CIK map |
| `lib_fetch` | `fetcher.mjs` + `bars.mjs` + `markdown.mjs` — HTTP retry, OHLC norm, note builder |
| `lib_llm` | `llm-client.mjs` — Claude API integration (JSON-mode chat for synthesis) |
| `lib_config` | `config.mjs` + `dilution-rules.mjs` + `obsidian-cli.mjs` — paths, rules, vault write |
| `lib_mm` | `scoring.mjs` + `schemas.mjs` + `entropy.mjs` — MarketMind signal math |

### Layer 3 — Puller Scripts (y=1840)
6 text nodes, color `5` (blue):
| Node ID | Content |
|---------|---------|
| `pull_market` | `orb-entropy.mjs` · `rel-vol-screen.mjs` · `entropy-compression-scan.mjs` · `backtest-orb-eod.mjs` · `earnings-entropy.mjs` · `qcpm-strategy-search.mjs` |
| `pull_fund` | `dilution-monitor.mjs` · `dd-report.mjs` · `capital-raise.mjs` · `disclosure-reality.mjs` · `company-risk-scan.mjs` |
| `pull_macro` | `fred.mjs` · `eia.mjs` · `bea.mjs` · `cboe.mjs` |
| `pull_bio` | `fda.mjs` · `arxiv.mjs` · `clinicaltrials.mjs` |
| `pull_osint` | `newsapi.mjs` · `reddit.mjs` · `telegram.mjs` · `opensecrets.mjs` |
| `pull_gov` | `sam.mjs` · `fpds.mjs` · `fema.mjs` |

### Layer 4 — MarketMind Agent Pipeline (y=2680)
Special section with full-width label + 8 specialist nodes + 1 synthesis node + 1 orchestrator node.
Nodes use color `4` (green) for specialist agents, `1` (red) for synthesis.

| Node ID | Content |
|---------|---------|
| `mm_price` | `price-agent.mjs` — SMA, EMA, MACD, RSI, Bollinger (260–420 bars) |
| `mm_risk` | `risk-agent.mjs` — Volatility, max drawdown, Sharpe, short interest |
| `mm_fund` | `fundamentals-agent.mjs` — Margins, growth, debt (income + cash flow) |
| `mm_sent` | `sentiment-agent.mjs` — Keyword sentiment (FMP news + NewsAPI) |
| `mm_macro` | `macro-agent.mjs` — FRED macro context (yield curve, VIX, spreads) |
| `mm_micro` | `microstructure-agent.mjs` — 1-min entropy, float, positioning |
| `mm_pred` | `prediction-market-agent.mjs` — Event contract consensus |
| `mm_synth` | `synthesis-agent.mjs` — Claude LLM → BULLISH/BEARISH/NEUTRAL + clear/watch/alert/critical |
| `mm_orch` | `agent-analyst.mjs` — Orchestrator: runs all 8, writes pull note to `05_Data_Pulls/` |

### Layer 5 — Data Pull Outputs (y=3620)
Mix of text (folder paths) and file nodes (key representative files), color `2` (orange):
| Node ID | Content |
|---------|---------|
| `out_market` | `05_Data_Pulls/Market/` — ORB sheets, entropy screens, rel-vol, backtests |
| `out_fund` | `05_Data_Pulls/Fundamentals/` — Dilution monitor, DD reports, capital raises |
| `out_macro` | `05_Data_Pulls/Macro/` — FRED snapshots, EIA, BEA |
| `out_quant` | `05_Data_Pulls/Quant/` — QCPM, backtest results |
| `out_bio` | `05_Data_Pulls/Biotech/` + `05_Data_Pulls/Research/` |
| `out_signals` | `06_Signals/` — alert · critical · watch · clear signal notes |

### Layer 6 — Domain Agents & Dashboards (y=4460)
File nodes for key agent READMEs + dashboards, color `1` (red) for dashboards:
| Node ID | File |
|---------|------|
| `agt_orch` | `16_Agents/Orchestrator Agent/README.md` |
| `agt_mkt` | `16_Agents/Market Agent/README.md` |
| `agt_mac` | `16_Agents/Macro Agent/README.md` |
| `agt_fun` | `16_Agents/Fundamentals Agent/README.md` |
| `agt_bio` | `16_Agents/Biotech Agent/README.md` |
| `dash_acc` | `16_Agents/Agent Command Center.md` |

---

## Edge Map (Directed Arrows)

```
External APIs → Lib Clients:
  src_market  → lib_fmp
  src_macro   → lib_fetch
  src_sec     → lib_edgar
  src_bio     → lib_fetch
  src_news    → lib_fetch
  src_gov     → lib_fetch

Lib Clients → Pullers:
  lib_fmp    → pull_market
  lib_fmp    → pull_fund
  lib_edgar  → pull_fund
  lib_fetch  → pull_macro
  lib_fetch  → pull_bio
  lib_fetch  → pull_osint
  lib_fetch  → pull_gov
  lib_fmp    → mm_price    (MarketMind uses fmp-client)
  lib_fmp    → mm_risk
  lib_fmp    → mm_fund
  lib_fmp    → mm_sent
  lib_fetch  → mm_macro
  lib_fmp    → mm_micro
  lib_llm    → mm_synth

MarketMind internal flow:
  mm_price → mm_synth
  mm_risk  → mm_synth
  mm_fund  → mm_synth
  mm_sent  → mm_synth
  mm_macro → mm_synth
  mm_micro → mm_synth
  mm_pred  → mm_synth
  mm_synth → mm_orch

Pullers → Outputs:
  pull_market → out_market
  pull_fund   → out_fund
  pull_fund   → out_signals   (dilution-monitor writes 06_Signals/)
  pull_macro  → out_macro
  pull_bio    → out_bio
  mm_orch     → out_market
  mm_orch     → out_signals
  pull_market → out_quant     (backtest + QCPM)

Outputs → Domain Agents:
  out_market  → agt_mkt
  out_fund    → agt_fun
  out_macro   → agt_mac
  out_bio     → agt_bio
  out_signals → agt_orch
  agt_orch    → dash_acc
```

---

## Implementation: Generator Script

**New file:** `scripts/pullers/vault-process-canvas.mjs`

The script:
1. Defines all nodes as a structured JS array (id, type, x, y, width, height, color, text/file)
2. Defines all edges as a JS array (id, fromNode, fromSide, toNode, toSide, optional label)
3. Computes x positions using a column index helper: `colX(i) = i * 960`
4. Computes y positions using a row helper: `rowY(layer) = layer * 860`
5. Writes `JSON.stringify({nodes, edges}, null, '\t')` to vault path via `config.mjs`

**Output path:** resolved from `config.mjs` vault base → `00_Dashboard/Vault Process Flow.canvas`

**Run command:** `node scripts/pullers/vault-process-canvas.mjs`

---

## Critical Files

| File | Role |
|------|------|
| `scripts/lib/config.mjs` | Vault root path constant — use for output path |
| `scripts/lib/markdown.mjs` | Not needed (Canvas is JSON, not markdown) |
| `00_Dashboard/Main Dashboard.canvas` | Reference for node format (already read) |
| `00_Dashboard/ORB + Entropy Strategy Dashboard.canvas` | Reference for text node style (already read) |
| `00_Dashboard/Vault Process Flow.canvas` | **Target output** (new file) |
| `scripts/pullers/vault-process-canvas.mjs` | **New generator script** |

---

## Verification

1. Run `node scripts/pullers/vault-process-canvas.mjs` — should exit 0 and print path
2. Open Obsidian, navigate to `00_Dashboard/Vault Process Flow.canvas`
3. Verify all 6 layers are visible with correct color bands
4. Pan through layers top-to-bottom; confirm arrows connect source → lib → puller → output → agent
5. Click a file node (e.g., `16_Agents/Market Agent/README.md`) — should open the note inline
6. Confirm MarketMind section shows 7 specialist → synthesis → orchestrator flow
7. Validate JSON is well-formed: `node -e "JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('path/to/canvas'))"`

# Plan: Vault Process Flow Canvas

## Context

The vault has ~40+ puller scripts, an 8-agent MarketMind pipeline, 16 domain-level note agents, and 3,450+ data pull notes spread across 18 subfolders. There is no visual document showing how scripts feed outputs, how agents interconnect, or how data propagates from raw API calls through to signals and dashboards. This Canvas fills that gap — a single navigable map of the entire automated pull system.

---

## Approach

Create a Node.js generator script that programmatically builds the Canvas JSON, then write the output to `00_Dashboard/Vault Process Flow.canvas`. A generator script is preferable to hand-editing JSON because positions are computed, nodes are readable, and the layout can be re-run when the vault evolves.

---

## Canvas Architecture

**Layout:** Top-to-bottom, 6 horizontal layers. Each layer is a full-width label band (70px) followed by a row of 900×700 nodes. Layers separated by ~90px gap.

**Key differentiator from existing dashboards:** This Canvas **uses edges (arrows)** to show directed data flow — the existing dashboards have no edges. This makes the flow legible without reading node content.

**Total canvas dimensions:** ~5700px wide × ~5800px tall

---

content.newText:
/**
 * vault-process-canvas.mjs
 *
 * Generates 00_Dashboard/Vault Process Flow.canvas — a directed-graph
 * Canvas showing how every script, lib module, data pull, and agent
 * connects in the My_Data vault.
 *
 * Run: node scripts/pullers/vault-process-canvas.mjs
 */

import { writeFileSync } from 'fs';
import { resolve } from 'path';
import { getVaultRoot } from '../lib/config.mjs';

// ─── Layout constants ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

const COL_W = 900;   // standard node width
const COL_GAP = 60;  // gap between columns
const NODE_H = 700;  // standard node height
const LABEL_H = 70;  // section label height
const LAYER_GAP = 90; // vertical gap between layers

const colX = (i) => i * (COL_W + COL_GAP);
const TOTAL_W = colX(6); // 6 columns → 5700px

// y-origin for each layer (label + nodes)
const LAYERS = {
  title:    0,
  srcLabel: 80,
  src:      80 + LABEL_H,
  libLabel: 80 + LABEL_H + NODE_H + LAYER_GAP,
  lib:      80 + LABEL_H + NODE_H + LAYER_GAP + LABEL_H,
  pullLabel: 80 + LABEL_H + NODE_H + LAYER_GAP + LABEL_H + NODE_H + LAYER_GAP,
  pull:      80 + LABEL_H + NODE_H + LAYER_GAP + LABEL_H + NODE_H + LAYER_GAP + LABEL_H,
};
// MarketMind starts after pull layer
LAYERS.mmLabel = LAYERS.pull + NODE_H + LAYER_GAP;
LAYERS.mm      = LAYERS.mmLabel + LABEL_H;
// Outputs start after MarketMind
LAYERS.outLabel = LAYERS.mm + NODE_H + LAYER_GAP;
LAYERS.out      = LAYERS.outLabel + LABEL_H;
// Domain agents start after outputs
LAYERS.agtLabel = LAYERS.out + NODE_H + LAYER_GAP;
LAYERS.agt      = LAYERS.agtLabel + LABEL_H;

// ─── Node helpers ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

let _edgeSeq = 0;
const edgeId = () => `e${String(++_edgeSeq).padStart(3, '0')}`;

function textNode(id, col, layer, text, color, overrides = {}) {
  return {
    id,
    type: 'text',
    text,
    x: colX(col),
    y: LAYERS[layer],
    width: overrides.width ?? COL_W,
    height: overrides.height ?? NODE_H,
    ...(color ? { color } : {}),
    ...overrides,
  };
}

function labelNode(id, layer, text, color) {
  return {
    id,
    type: 'text',
    text,
    x: 0,
    y: LAYERS[layer],
    width: TOTAL_W,
    height: LABEL_H,
    color,
  };
}

function fileNode(id, col, layer, file, overrides = {}) {
  return {
    id,
    type: 'file',
    file,
    x: colX(col),
    y: LAYERS[layer],
    width: overrides.width ?? COL_W,
    height: overrides.height ?? NODE_H,
    ...overrides,
  };
}

function edge(from, to, label) {
  return {
    id: edgeId(),
    fromNode: from,
    fromSide: 'bottom',
    toNode: to,
    toSide: 'top',
    ...(label ? { label } : {}),
  };
}

// ─── Nodes ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

const nodes = [

  // ── Title ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  {
    id: 'title',
    type: 'text',
    text: '# VAULT PROCESS FLOW — Scripts × Lib Modules × Agents × Data Pulls',
    x: 0,
    y: LAYERS.title,
    width: TOTAL_W,
    height: LABEL_H,

/**
 * vault-process-canvas.mjs
 *
 * Generates 00_Dashboard/Vault Process Flow.canvas — a directed-graph
 * Canvas showing how every script, lib module, data pull, and agent
 * connects in the My_Data vault.
 *
 * Run: node scripts/pullers/vault-process-canvas.mjs
 */

import { writeFileSync } from 'fs';
import { resolve } from 'path';
import { getVaultRoot } from '../lib/config.mjs';

// ─── Layout constants ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

const COL_W = 900;   // standard node width
const COL_GAP = 60;  // gap between columns
const NODE_H = 700;  // standard node height
const LABEL_H = 70;  // section label height
const LAYER_GAP = 90; // vertical gap between layers

const colX = (i) => i * (COL_W + COL_GAP);
const TOTAL_W = colX(6); // 6 columns → 5700px

// y-origin for each layer (label + nodes)
const LAYERS = {
  title:    0,
  srcLabel: 80,
  src:      80 + LABEL_H,
  libLabel: 80 + LABEL_H + NODE_H + LAYER_GAP,
  lib:      80 + LABEL_H + NODE_H + LAYER_GAP + LABEL_H,
  pullLabel: 80 + LABEL_H + NODE_H + LAYER_GAP + LABEL_H + NODE_H + LAYER_GAP,
  pull:      80 + LABEL_H + NODE_H + LAYER_GAP + LABEL_H + NODE_H + LAYER_GAP + LABEL_H,
};
// MarketMind starts after pull layer
LAYERS.mmLabel = LAYERS.pull + NODE_H + LAYER_GAP;
LAYERS.mm      = LAYERS.mmLabel + LABEL_H;
// Outputs start after MarketMind
LAYERS.outLabel = LAYERS.mm + NODE_H + LAYER_GAP;
LAYERS.out      = LAYERS.outLabel + LABEL_H;
// Domain agents start after outputs
LAYERS.agtLabel = LAYERS.out + NODE_H + LAYER_GAP;
LAYERS.agt      = LAYERS.agtLabel + LABEL_H;

// ─── Node helpers ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

let _edgeSeq = 0;
const edgeId = () => `e${String(++_edgeSeq).padStart(3, '0')}`;

function textNode(id, col, layer, text, color, overrides = {}) {
  return {
    id,
    type: 'text',
    text,
    x: colX(col),
    y: LAYERS[layer],
    width: overrides.width ?? COL_W,
    height: overrides.height ?? NODE_H,
    ...(color ? { color } : {}),
    ...overrides,
  };
}

function labelNode(id, layer, text, color) {
  return {
    id,
    type: 'text',
    text,
    x: 0,
    y: LAYERS[layer],
    width: TOTAL_W,
    height: LABEL_H,
    color,
  };
}

function fileNode(id, col, layer, file, overrides = {}) {
  return {
    id,
    type: 'file',
    file,
    x: colX(col),
    y: LAYERS[layer],
    width: overrides.width ?? COL_W,
    height: overrides.height ?? NODE_H,
    ...overrides,
  };
}

function edge(from, to, label) {
  return {
    id: edgeId(),
    fromNode: from,
    fromSide: 'bottom',
    toNode: to,
    toSide: 'top',
    ...(label ? { label } : {}),
  };
}
